name: Marshall Hanging Ferret Hammock
description: Give your ferret a lofty place to rest with the Marshall Hanging Ferret Hammock. Ferrets are very sensitive to heat and hammocks provide a comfy, cool place to snooze. Marshall Hanging Ferret Hammock hangs easily inside or outside the cage. It is made of a soft, fleece-like fabric that is easy to clean and big enough for two ferrets.
